baseline_solo.agent_role_label: Baseline Solo Agent (single-shot evidence ingestion, no decomposition)
baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: SPGC exhibits severe fundamental distress (negative PE, PB=0.058, net margin=-74%, all past earnings negative) combined with catastrophic price collapse (-92% in 60d). Macro regime is overheat/restrictive. Critical data blocks are absent or insufficient: fundamentals lack PIT-safe filings, news is empty, filing confirmation unavailable, ownership data not evaluated, alt-data adapters failed (sec_edgar cik_not_found, github unmapped). Information integrity assessment explicitly forbids use as primary signal. No corroborating evidence for any thesis. Insufficient evidence to support either surge_short or quality_long sleeve eligibility. Multiple veto conditions tripped.
invalidation_conditions: hard_risk_limit_breached: net_margin_pct_ttm=-74.0 indicates severe operational distress
risk_flags: no_analyst_coverage: fmp_sentiment shows 0 buy/hold/sell ratings across all months
no_news_catalyst: polygon_news returned 0 items in 7d window
macro_headwind: overheat regime with strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline
suggested_improvements: Obtain PIT-safe fundamental filings (10-Q or 10-K) with accepted_datetime <= cutoff to populate fundamental_snapshot
Verify ticker SPGC CIK mapping in SEC Edgar to enable filing_confirmation and ownership_positioning
Collect news catalyst from alternative sources (press releases, investor relations) to populate news_event_summary
Map SPGC to GitHub repository (if applicable) to enable tech_activity alt-data
Obtain 13F institutional ownership data (if available) to assess crowding and smart-money positioning
Clarify business model and revenue sustainability given -74% net margin and negative earnings across all recent quarters

data_quality_flags.detail: fundamental_snapshot.snapshot_quarter all null; no PIT-safe income/balance/cashflow rows
news_event_summary: 20 items dropped because publishedDate > cutoff; 0 items remain
sec_edgar: cik_not_found — no CIK match for ticker SPGC
github_public: unmapped_ticker — SPGC not in ticker_to_github.csv
sec_form4: cik_not_found — no CIK for SPGC
valuation_snapshot ratios_ttm flagged not_PIT_safe — for display only, not for decision inputs
price_snapshot live quote 2025-03-14T20:00:01+00:00 is after allowed_data_cutoff

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: Information integrity assessment explicitly forbids use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false due to unimplemented pollution-defense layer in v1. This is a fail-closed design choice that prevents any thesis confirmation without primary-source corroboration. Combined with missing fundamental filings and zero news, the packet provides insufficient evidence for any directional decision.
recommended_followups: Obtain SEC CIK for SPGC to unlock filing_confirmation and ownership_positioning blocks
Collect PIT-safe quarterly filings (10-Q/10-K) with accepted_datetime <= decision_timestamp
Verify whether SPGC is an active, reporting company or shell/delisted entity
If active: obtain recent press releases, earnings call transcripts, and investor relations materials
If shell/delisted: escalate to compliance for universe exclusion
Rerun analysis once fundamental_snapshot and news_event_summary blocks are populated
baseline_solo.reason: Multiple veto conditions tripped: (1) insufficient_evidence across fundamental_snapshot, news_event_summary, filing_confirmation, ownership_positioning; (2) hard_risk_limit_breached: net_margin=-74%, return_60d=-92.29%; (3) information_integrity_veto: use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, corroboration_status=uncorroborated; (4) missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance: no PIT-safe filings, no news catalyst, no SEC filings. Surge-short sleeve cannot be satisfied without corroborating evidence of catalyst and fundamental deterioration. Quality-long sleeve impossible given negative profitability and extreme drawdown. Decision locked as veto.
risk_notes: Extreme price collapse (-92% in 60d) without corresponding news catalyst or fundamental disclosure suggests potential delisting, bankruptcy, or data error.
Net margin of -74% and all past earnings negative (EPS: -1.4, -0.8, -0.79, -0.73) indicate severe operational distress.
Current ratio 0.939 < 1.0 signals liquidity stress; debt_to_equity 0.091 is low but insufficient to offset profitability crisis.
Zero analyst coverage (0 buy/hold/sell ratings) and zero news in 7d window suggest either micro-cap neglect or delisting imminent.
SEC filing unavailable (cik_not_found) prevents verification of business status, going-concern warnings, or restructuring plans.
Wikipedia pageviews show modest attention (peak 216 views on 2025-02-19, baseline ~70-100) but no corroborating news or catalyst.
Macro regime (overheat/restrictive) enforces strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline; SPGC fails all quality thresholds.
Information integrity assessment forbids primary-signal use; no alternative-data corroboration available.
Insufficient evidence to distinguish between (a) genuine short opportunity, (b) distressed equity, (c) delisted/shell entity, or (d) data error.

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: hard_risk_limit_breached
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: net_margin_pct_ttm=-74.0 (threshold: > -50% for quality_long); return_60d_pct=-92.29 (extreme drawdown); roe=-1.654, roa=-1.825 (both deeply negative)

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: fundamental_snapshot.snapshot_quarter all null; news_event_summary.items empty; filing_confirmation unavailable; ownership_positioning not_evaluated; no PIT-safe filings available

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: information_integrity_veto
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false; corroboration_status=uncorroborated; source_tier_distribution T1=0 T2=0 T3=1 T4=1; pollution-defense layer unimplemented in v1

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: lookahead_data_used
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: envelope.data_after_cutoff_used=false; envelope.lookahead_safe=true; no lookahead violations detected

rule_engine_path: 3. Evaluate valuation_snapshot: pe=-0.009, pb=0.058, ev_ebitda=-0.769, net_margin=-74% → fails quality_long thresholds
4. Evaluate fundamental_snapshot: status=insufficient_evidence, snapshot_quarter all null → cannot populate income/balance/cashflow
5. Evaluate news_event_summary: status=data_unavailable, items=[], ndi_score=null → no catalyst narrative
6. Evaluate alternative_data_features: adapter_selection fallback_to_default=true, all industry adapters not_connected → no corroborating alt-data
7. Evaluate information_integrity_assessment: use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, corroboration_status=uncorroborated → veto on integrity grounds
8. Evaluate sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: ownership_positioning.status=not_evaluated, institutional_ownership_pct=null → no ownership corroboration
9. Evaluate filing_confirmation: status=not_evaluated, sec_edgar cik_not_found → cannot verify business status
10. Evaluate price_snapshot: return_60d=-92.29%, return_20d=-72.91%, return_5d=-38.29% → extreme drawdown without news catalyst
11. Candidate_type surge_short: requires (a) catalyst + (b) corroborating alt-data + (c) fundamental deterioration + (d) no veto. Conditions (a), (b), (d) fail.
12. Candidate_type quality_long: requires (a) positive profitability + (b) reasonable valuation + (c) no veto. Conditions (a), (b), (c) fail.
decision_log: T+0: Ingest evidence packet. Envelope: lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false. Proceed.
T+1: Macro regime analysis. Overheat/moderately_restrictive (stress_score=2). Equity allocation cap 20%. Discipline: strict_quality_and_valuation_caution. SPGC must meet high quality bar.
T+2: Valuation analysis. PE=-0.009 (negative earnings), PB=0.058 (distressed), EV/EBITDA=-0.769 (negative EBITDA), net_margin=-74% (severe loss). Fails quality_long thresholds.

T+3: Fundamental analysis. fundamental_snapshot.status=insufficient_evidence. snapshot_quarter all null. No PIT-safe income/balance/cashflow rows. Cannot assess profitability, leverage, or cash generation.
T+4: Catalyst analysis. news_event_summary.status=data_unavailable. items=[]. ndi_score=null. polygon_news returned 0 items in 7d window. No narrative catalyst identified.

T+5: Alternative-data analysis. alternative_data_features.adapter_selection fallback_to_default=true. All industry-specific adapters not_connected. github_public unmapped_ticker. sec_edgar cik_not_found. No corroborating alt-data.

T+6: Information integrity analysis. information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false. corroboration_status=uncorroborated. source_tier_distribution T1=0 T2=0 T3=1 T4=1. Pollution-defense layer unimplemented. Veto on integrity grounds.

T+7: Ownership/sentiment analysis. sentiment_community_ownership_evidence.ownership_positioning.status=not_evaluated. institutional_ownership_pct=null. hedge_fund_holder_count=null. No ownership corroboration.
T+8: Filing analysis. filing_confirmation.status=not_evaluated. sec_edgar cik_not_found. sec_form4 cik_not_found. Cannot verify business status, going-concern, or restructuring.

T+9: Price action analysis. return_60d=-92.29%, return_20d=-72.91%, return_5d=-38.29%. Extreme drawdown. But no news catalyst, no fundamental disclosure, no filing. Suggests delisting, bankruptcy, or data error.

T+10: Surge-short sleeve evaluation. Requires: (a) catalyst (missing), (b) corroborating alt-data (missing), (c) fundamental deterioration (present but unverified), (d) no veto (veto tripped). Sleeve ineligible.

T+11: Quality-long sleeve evaluation. Requires: (a) positive profitability (net_margin=-74%, fails), (b) reasonable valuation (pb=0.058, pe=-0.009, fails), (c) no veto (veto tripped). Sleeve ineligible.

T+12: Veto decision. Multiple veto conditions tripped: insufficient_evidence, hard_risk_limit_breached, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance, information_integrity_veto. Decision=veto. Position_size_pct=0.0. Immutable.
baseline_solo.community_attention_risk_note: Wikipedia pageviews show modest attention (peak 216 views 2025-02-19, baseline 70-100) but no corroborating news, analyst coverage, or social media spike. Attention is not a trading signal without fundamental or catalyst corroboration.
baseline_solo.unverified_claim_note: No primary-source corroboration available. Information integrity assessment forbids use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false. All alternative-data adapters either failed (sec_edgar, github_public, sec_13f, sec_form4) or returned no actionable data (wikipedia_pageviews, fmp_sentiment).
baseline_solo.thesis_confirmation_block_reason: Essential blocks absent or insufficient: (1) fundamental_snapshot.status=insufficient_evidence (no PIT-safe filings); (2) news_event_summary.status=data_unavailable (no catalyst narrative); (3) filing_confirmation.status=not_evaluated (SEC CIK not found); (4) information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false (pollution-defense unimplemented, corroboration_status=uncorroborated). Cannot confirm any thesis without primary-source corroboration and PIT-safe fundamentals.
baseline_solo.sentiment_risk_adjustment_note: fmp_sentiment shows 0 analyst buy/hold/sell ratings across all months (Jan 2024 – Mar 2025). Zero coverage suggests either micro-cap neglect or delisting imminent. Sentiment data is descriptor-only and cannot override veto.
baseline_solo.ownership_risk_adjustment_note: ownership_positioning.status=not_evaluated. sec_13f not_available_on_current_plan. sec_form4 cik_not_found. No institutional ownership, hedge fund positioning, or insider trading data available. Cannot assess crowding or smart-money support.
baseline_solo.institutional_sponsorship_note: No institutional ownership data available. Zero analyst coverage. No evidence of institutional sponsorship or support.
baseline_solo.smart_money_benchmark_note: No 13F, Form 4, or insider trading data available. Cannot benchmark against smart-money positioning.
